programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: The California Coast will have wait when, stranded in a ghost town, the Bundys and the D'Arcys catch "gold fever" and become wary mining partners.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: Buck the Dog has romantic designs on every bitch in the neighborhood, but dashes Peg & Al's hopes of becoming wealthy breeders when he refuses to court a pampered pedigree.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: Al loses his television set on a neighborhood boxing bet; even so, he, along with the boxer's dad, advise defeated fighter Vinnie to marry rich and forget about a career.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: Al decides to run away from home when a pregnant Peg becomes demanding.

programs.desc: Al builds a private clubhouse to escape, but discovers there are many miserable fathers-to-be who wish to join him.
